summary: Comprehensive E2E testing of Dine page: ProductCard → ProductDetailModal → Add to Cart → CartSidebar flow. All core features verified and passing. Login as dipali@clubconcierge.in, navigated to /dine, clicked Daily Meals pill, verified DineContentModal, clicked View Details on product card, verified ProductDetailModal opens above DineContentModal, clicked Include button, verified CartSidebar opens with correct pricing. Bundles pill also verified. Z-index stacking confirmed correct.

issues: Available Flavours section (amber background with pill chips) and Select Base/Select Flavour pill selectors are not shown for Dine products — expected because dine products lack Shopify variant data. Per spec this is acceptable.
The 'Include' button label (dine-specific) correctly replaces 'Add to Cart' label — working as designed.

features_verified.dine_page_loads: PASS — /dine loads with hero section, allergy/loves badges, Mira quote
features_verified.mira_quote_block: PASS — Mira quote block with '♥ Mira knows Mojo' visible
features_verified.sub_category_tabs: PASS — All, Special Diets, Portion Guide, Morning Meal, Evening Meal tabs
features_verified.product_cards_13: PASS — 13 product cards loaded with image, name, price, 'View Details' button
features_verified.view_details_opens_product_detail_modal: PASS — ProductDetailModal opens when 'View Details' clicked (product: Allergy-Safe Rotation Pack)
features_verified.product_detail_large_image_left: PASS — Grid layout: large image left, details right (md:grid-cols-2)
features_verified.product_detail_name_description: PASS — Product name h2 + description on right side
features_verified.available_flavours_section: INFO — Not shown (no Shopify flavor data for Dine products — acceptable per spec)
features_verified.select_base_flavour_selectors: INFO — Not shown (no Shopify variant data — acceptable per spec)
features_verified.add_to_cart_works: PASS — Clicking Include adds product to cart and opens CartSidebar
features_verified.cart_sidebar_your_requests: PASS — CartSidebar opens with 'Your Requests' header, '1 product'
features_verified.cart_item_with_quantity_controls: PASS — 'Allergy-Safe Rotation Pack' shown with quantity controls (-/+/1) and ₹2,299
features_verified.bundles_pill: PASS — Bundles modal opens (data-testid=dine-modal-bundles) with 'Dining Bundles' header
features_verified.bundles_allergy_chips: PASS — 'Chicken-free · Treatment-safe' chips in bundles modal
features_verified.bundle_cards: PASS — 3 bundle cards (Premium Mealtime Bundle, Test Dine Bundle, Treat Lover Bundle) with item chips
features_verified.get_bundle_button: PASS — 'Get Bundle →' buttons visible on bundle cards (3 found)
features_verified.get_bundle_to_sent: PASS — Clicking Get Bundle toggles to '✓ Sent!'
features_verified.z_index_stacking: PASS — ProductDetailModal z-index=9999 vs DineContentModal z-index=56. ProductDetailModal correctly renders above DineContentModal via createPortal(document.body)

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: When CartSidebar (z-index 10000) is open and DineContentModal is also open, the CartSidebar overlay blocks interaction with the DineContentModal 'Close' button. Users would need to close the cart first before closing the modal. This is a UX edge case, not a blocker.
Minor: PetHomePage has missing 'key' props warning in React list rendering (console warning, not visible to user).
Non-critical: Several 404 errors for unknown resources on page load (likely optional API calls that gracefully fail).

success_rate.frontend: 100% — all required features verified and passing

context_for_next_testing_agent: All Dine page flows are working end-to-end: category pills → DineContentModal → ProductCard (View Details) → ProductDetailModal (z=9999 via createPortal) → Include button → CartSidebar (Your Requests). Bundles pill shows 3 bundle cards with Get Bundle→Sent toggle. DineContentModal now uses ProductCard component (not custom DineProductCard). Cart shows: item, -/+ quantity controls, Products Subtotal, Shipping ₹150, Products Total, Checkout button. dipali@clubconcierge.in / lola4304 is the regular user.
